spec.name: The Great Eastern Desert
spec.description: A vast desert stretches for miles, the sands constantly shifting around you. A pyramid lies to the north-east and a snow-capped mountain range to the west. You spy a narrow dirt trail leading away to the west into the foothills.

north.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

east.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

south.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

west.description: A small dirt trail leads off to the west where it joins a large clay road some distance away.
